text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

44 
CLM_IP_INITL_MS_DRG_CD 
LABEL: 
Claim Inpatient Initial MS-DRG Code 
DESCRIPTION: This field comes from the Claim Inpatient Initial MS DRG Code field (CLM-IP-INITL-MS-DRG-CD) that is 
present on the first NCH claim record included in the stay. If there is no CLM-IP-INITL-MS-DRG-CD on the 
1st claim, then take the first found code on any of the other claims that make up the stay. 
SHORT NAME:
